# Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage

> Independent Sussex removals and storage company established 2017, serving Eastbourne, Brighton, Hastings, Worthing and the wider Sussex / Surrey / Kent area. Full-service house and office moves, international (UK ↔ Thailand) removals, packing, prestige steel storage rooms, antique and fine-art handling. BS 8564 accredited.

This file lists every indexable page on https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk and is regenerated by `tools/build-llms-txt.py` whenever pages are added or removed (enforced by audit Rule 43).

## Core pages

- [Areas Covered — Depot Mileage & Route Times](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/areas-covered.html): Every Mark Ratcliffe Moving service area indexed by depot mileage, route and typical journey time from our Lower Dicker base in East Sussex.
- [Join the Mark Ratcliffe Moving Team](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/careers.html): Join the Mark Ratcliffe Moving team — Sussex removals jobs in Lower Dicker, Eastbourne and beyond. Crew, drivers and packers wanted.
- [Removals Eastbourne - Storage Eastbourne](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/): Mark Ratcliffe Moving — family-run Sussex removals and storage. Free quotes, BAR member, fixed prices, packing & international moves.
- [Mark Ratcliffe Moving | Online Removals Quote](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/mark-ratcliffe-moving-online-removals-quote.html): Request a free Sussex removals quote from Mark Ratcliffe Moving — local, national or international. We reply within 48 hours.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/privacy-policy.html): How Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage collects, uses and protects your personal data. UK GDPR / Data Protection Act 2018 compliant.
- [Reviews & Testimonials | Mark Ratcliffe Moving Eastbourne](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/reviews.html): Read real reviews from Mark Ratcliffe Moving customers across Eastbourne, Hailsham and Sussex. House removals, storage, international moves …
- [Sitemap](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/sitemap.html): Sitemap for markratcliffemoving.co.uk — every public service, location, blog post and resource page, organised by section. BAR member.

## Services

- [Antiques Moving Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/antiques-moving.html): Specialist antiques moving across Sussex — period furniture, mirrors, clocks, art. Archival tissue, climate-stable transit, BAR-trained …
- [BAR Member Removals Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/bar-member-removals.html): BAR member removals from Sussex. Bound by the BAR Code of Practice, deposits protected by the Advance Payment Guarantee. BS 8564 accredited.
- [BS 8564 Accredited Removals Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/bs-8564-accredited-removals.html): BS 8564 accredited removals in Sussex. Independently audited British Standard, FHIO ombudsman cover, UK–Thai Movers Group member.
- [Custom Timber Crating Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/custom-crate-service.html): Custom timber crate service for art, antiques, sculptures, mirrors and one-off items. ISPM-15 compliant for international shipping. Built at …
- [European Removals Eastbourne](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/european-removals-eastbourne.html): European removals from Eastbourne to France, Spain, Italy, Portugal and beyond. Customs documentation, part-loads, full-loads. Free quote.
- [Export Packing & Crating Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/export-packing-and-crating.html): Export packing & crating from Sussex. Moisture-resistant pad-wrap, custom timber crates, ISPM-15 compliant. BAR Overseas Group.
- [Family-Run Removals Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/family-run-removals-sussex.html): Family-run independent removals in Sussex. Survey by Mark, long-serving crews, phone answered by name. BAR member, BS 8564 accredited.
- [Fragile-Only Packing Service Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/fragile-only-packing.html): Fragile-only packing in Sussex. China, glass, mirrors, art, lamps, electronics packed by our crew. BAR member. Free quote.
- [Full Packing Service Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/full-packing-service.html): Our full packing service: we pack absolutely everything in your home — kitchen, wardrobes, books, art, electronics. BAR-trained packers …
- [House Clearance Eastbourne | Furniture & Probate](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/house-clearance-eastbourne.html): Compassionate, full-service house clearance in Eastbourne. Probate, downsizing and furniture removal. Licensed waste carriers. Free quote.
- [Removals Services Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/): Every removals service Mark Ratcliffe Moving offers in Sussex: local moves, packing, piano, antiques, white-glove, international, storage …
- [International Removals Eastbourne | Thailand & Worldwide](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/international-removals-eastbourne.html): International removals from Eastbourne to over 200 countries. UK-Thailand specialists, BAR Overseas Group member. Door-to-door service.
- [Man and Van Eastbourne | Same-Day & Small Moves](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/man-and-van-eastbourne.html): Reliable man and van service in Eastbourne. Same-day, single items, small moves. Same BAR-trained crews, lower price point. From £55/hour.
- [Office Removals Eastbourne | Commercial Moves](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/office-removals-eastbourne.html): Office and commercial removals in Eastbourne. Out-of-hours moves, IT equipment, minimal downtime. BAR-registered. Free site survey.
- [Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage Packaging Shop](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/packaging-shop.html): Mark Ratcliffe Moving packaging shop in Eastbourne — boxes, tape, bubble wrap, blankets, wardrobe cartons and packing supplies for collection …
- [Packing Services Eastbourne | Pad-Wrap Specialists](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/packing-services-eastbourne.html): Professional packing services in Eastbourne. Full pad-wrapping, export-grade crating and fragile packing. BAR-trained packers.
- [Piano Moving Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/piano-moving.html): Specialist piano moving across Sussex and beyond. Upright, baby grand and full grand. Skid trolleys, climate-aware vans, full insurance.
- [Removals to Australia & New Zealand from Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/removals-to-australia-and-new-zealand.html): Removals to Australia & New Zealand from Eastbourne. Container shipping, AQIS & MPI biosecurity-safe packing. BAR member. Free quote.
- [Removals to France from Eastbourne & Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/removals-to-france.html): Removals to France from Eastbourne. ToR1 customs paperwork, Channel Tunnel and ferry routes, full-loads and part-loads. BAR member. Free quote.

- [Removals to the UAE from Eastbourne](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/removals-to-uae.html): Removals to the UAE from Eastbourne. Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah. Air or sea freight, residency-visa-ready customs. BAR member.
- [Removals to the USA & Canada from Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/removals-to-usa-and-canada.html): Removals to the USA & Canada from Eastbourne. ISF 10+2 customs, Form 3299 relief, container or air freight. BAR member. Free quote.
- [Storage Eastbourne | Prestige Steel Rooms](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/storage-eastbourne.html): Secure self storage in Eastbourne / Lower Dicker. Individual steel Prestige rooms, 24-hour CCTV, alarmed access. Short and long-term storage.
- [Student Removals Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/student-removals.html): Student removals across Sussex — Sussex University, University of Brighton, Eastbourne College. Hall-to-hall, hall-to-home, single rooms.
- [Moving to Thailand? Professional Removal Service](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/thai-moving-services.html): UK to Thailand removals by Mark Ratcliffe Moving — door-to-door shipping, customs paperwork, container booking and Bangkok delivery from Sussex.
- [Unpacking Service Sussex](https://www.markratcliffemoving.co.uk/services/unpacking-service.html): Our unpacking service: boxes unpacked into agreed cupboards and rooms, cardboard removed, beds made. Live from your new home the same day.
